questionHtml: Identify one variable that should be kept constant while measuring enzyme activity at all temperatures.
markschemeHtml:
pH/concentration of enzyme/concentration of substrate;

Do not accept temperature

Do not accept “amount”

meta.title: Identify one variable that should be kept constant while measuring enzyme activity at all temperatures.
breadcrumbLabels: C1.1.8. Effects of temperature, pH and substrate concentration on the rate of enzyme activity
